# rythm-divider



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Visual separator between content sections, with an optional centred text label.

## Properties

| Property      | Attribute     | Description                                                 | Type                         | Default        |
| ------------- | ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | -------------- |
| `label`       | `label`       | Optional label displayed at the centre of the divider line. | `string \| undefined`        | `undefined`    |
| `orientation` | `orientation` | Orientation of the divider line.                            | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `'horizontal'` |
